arts.sum: After overcoming Viktoria Plzen in the Round of 16, Lazio have booked a meeting with Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League quarter-finals. arts.ttl: Lazio Duo Called Up for Italy Squad Ahead of UEFA Nations League Quarter-Finals vs Germany
arts.sum: Lazio will have two representatives in the Italy squad that will take on Germany in the UEFA Nations League Quarter-finals, as Mattia Zaccagni and Nicolo Rovella were both selected.
